textByHash.081f794d6011544f099ff11da9f672c469c75b04: All challenges complete. Very impressive JalYt. Have some TokKul, and a little extra something.
textByHash.588f029725a291aa1eda28fb57effce27a95a86c: JalYt--Xo-. The challenge awaits, if you're brave enough.
textByHash.77e459342c378ea2c34e5841b4ac7171fbb6ee95: Six challenges complete. Very impressive JalYt. Have some TokKul, and a little extra something.
textByHash.78ee4c1b6dc0f7b5e8d59a27b2da90ffbd8374ed: Deep in inferno, many offspring of TzTok-Jad. More powerful though. More dangerous.
textByHash.8b2c7b8de9087e2823b096595939036a41e5093c: Challenge complete. Have some TokKul. Now, a new challenge awaits.
textByHash.9a36cf8bb83417297b115046ba06ab8a420d9ab7: JalYt--Kal-. Few match your strength. Do you wish to take on the challenge again?
textByHash.b2d0b6501648967f5534e39f1885e378b22a245c: The finest obsidian. Cost many TokKul.
textByHash.c35c37314cc9b49c425ac1dc29f94532fcf490d9: The challenge is now beneath you? So be it.
textByHash.d27a3ef060ff8b4f8f1fdf5e79e0bc5a3e9bd9b4: Now, have you come for the challenge?
textByHash.e84e1f0487eb68f37ac7c4f466457a74383cb21d: Failure. Maybe the challenge is not for you.
textByHash.ec6039a84f982d0933aad2f6805ee5bd6a77f2a1: The offspring need dealing with. A challenge for you perhaps, if you're brave enough.
